description: Legal fragment mentioning people such as Abū l-Barakāt, Peraḥya b. Binyamin the elder, and the elder Abū Yaʿqūb. Also mentions 3 qinṭārs of something, maybe 'al-sharābī,' and formulae from a power of attorney. All crossed out. Probably in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
